---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lora:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Mulish:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap');

.quarto-title, h1.title, #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
#quarto-content { padding: 0 !important; }
.page-layout-full main { padding: 0 !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
body { background: #f7f6f2 !important; }

:root {
  --ink:     #1c1c27;
  --muted:   #6b6b82;
  --bg:      #f7f6f2;
  --white:   #ffffff;
  --accent:  #2d5f4f;
  --accent-light: #d4ede4;
  --gold:    #c9a84c;
  --border:  #e3e1da;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

.lp {
  font-family: 'Mulish', sans-serif;
  color: var(--ink);
  background: var(--bg);
}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero {
  background: var(--ink);
  padding: 0;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.hero-noise {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  opacity: .4;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-glow {
  position: absolute;
  top: -120px; right: -60px;
  width: 500px; height: 500px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(45,95,79,.4) 0%, transparent 65%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-glow2 {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -100px; left: 20%;
  width: 300px; height: 300px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(201,168,76,.12) 0%, transparent 65%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 5rem 2rem 0;
  width: 100%;
}

.hero-eyebrow {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
}

.hero-eyebrow-line {
  width: 32px;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--gold);
}

.hero-eyebrow span {
  font-size: .7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--gold);
}

.hero h1 {
  font-family: 'Lora', serif;
  font-weight: 400;
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
  line-height: 1.18;
  color: #ffffff;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.hero h1 em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: #a8d5c2;
}

.hero-desc {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.62);
  line-height: 1.75;
  max-width: 520px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}

.hero-cta {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .6rem;
  font-size: .82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: .04em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.45);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  border-radius: 100px;
  padding: .55rem 1.2rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all .2s;
  margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
}

.hero-cta svg { flex-shrink: 0; }

.hero-cta:hover {
  color: #a8d5c2;
  border-color: rgba(168,213,194,.5);
  background: rgba(168,213,194,.06);
}

/* ── CARDS STRIP IM HERO ── */
.hero-cards-strip {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  width: 100%;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  padding: 2.5rem 2rem 3.5rem;
}

.hero-cards-inner {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.hero-sh {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.75rem;
}

.hero-sh-label {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #a8d5c2;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.hero-sh-line {
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.1);
}

.hero-cards {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(360px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.25rem;
}

.hero-card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 2rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .9rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow .25s, transform .25s, background .25s, border-color .25s;
}

.hero-card-accent-bar {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0;
  width: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #a8d5c2, transparent);
  transform: scaleY(0);
  transform-origin: top;
  transition: transform .3s ease;
}

.hero-card:hover {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  border-color: rgba(168,213,194,.25);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.hero-card:hover .hero-card-accent-bar { transform: scaleY(1); }

.hero-card-status {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .35rem;
  font-size: .68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #a8d5c2;
  background: rgba(168,213,194,.12);
  border-radius: 100px;
  padding: .28rem .8rem;
  width: fit-content;
}

.hero-card-status::before {
  content: '';
  width: 6px; height: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #a8d5c2;
}

.hero-card h2 {
  font-family: 'Lora', serif;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.35;
  color: #ffffff;
}

.hero-card-desc {
  font-size: .88rem;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.5);
  line-height: 1.7;
  flex: 1;
}

.hero-card-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .4rem;
}

.hero-ctag {
  font-size: .68rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.4);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border-radius: 100px;
  padding: .18rem .65rem;
}

.hero-card-footer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding-top: .5rem;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  font-size: .8rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #a8d5c2;
}

/* ── MAIN CONTENT ── */
.main {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 4rem 2rem 2rem;
}

.sh {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.sh-label {
  font-size: .85rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sh-line {
  flex: 1;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--border);
}

/* ── INFO GRID ── */
.info-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(185px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.info-card {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.3rem 1.4rem;
}

.info-label {
  font-size: .65rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin-bottom: .55rem;
}

.info-val {
  font-family: 'Lora', serif;
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--ink);
  line-height: 1.45;
}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
.lp-footer {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 1.75rem 2rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .75rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
  color: var(--muted);
}

.lp-footer a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }
.lp-footer a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

@media (max-width: 580px) {
  .hero-inner { padding: 3.5rem 1.25rem 0; }
  .hero-cards-strip { padding: 2rem 1.25rem 2.5rem; }
  .hero-cards { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .main { padding: 3rem 1.25rem 1.5rem; }
  .lp-footer { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
}
</style>

<div class="lp">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <header class="hero">
    <div class="hero-noise"></div>
    <div class="hero-glow"></div>
    <div class="hero-glow2"></div>

    <div class="hero-inner">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">
        <div class="hero-eyebrow-line"></div>
        <span>Arieja Farugie &nbsp;·&nbsp; Methoden &amp; Statistik</span>
      </div>
      <h1>Workshops für<br><em>empirische Methoden</em><br>in R</h1>
      <p class="hero-desc">
        Praxisnahe Materialien für Studierende der Sozialwissenschaften –
        von den Grundlagen in R bis zum vollständigen, reproduzierbaren Analyse-Workflow.
      </p>
      <a class="hero-cta" href="mailto:farugie[at]psych.uni-frankfurt.de">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m2 7 10 7 10-7"/></svg>
        farugie[at]psych.uni-frankfurt.de
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- CARDS IM HERO -->
    <div class="hero-cards-strip">
      <div class="hero-cards-inner">
        <div class="hero-sh">
          <span class="hero-sh-label">Workshops</span>
          <div class="hero-sh-line"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-cards">

          <a class="hero-card" href="workshops/ws1/index.html">
            <div class="hero-card-accent-bar"></div>
            <div class="hero-card-status">Verfügbar</div>
            <h2>Einführung in R &amp; RStudio</h2>
            <p class="hero-card-desc">
              Zweitägiger Einstieg in R und RStudio: Grundlagen, Datenimport,
              Datenaufbereitung mit dplyr, Umkodieren, Joins und fehlende Werte –
              mit Mini-Projekt zum Abschluss.
            </p>
            <div class="hero-card-tags">
              <span class="hero-ctag">2 Tage</span>
              <span class="hero-ctag">Einsteiger</span>
              <span class="hero-ctag">dplyr</span>
              <span class="hero-ctag">haven</span>
              <span class="hero-ctag">psych</span>
            </div>
            <div class="hero-card-footer">
              Zum Workshop
              <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
            </div>
          </a>

          <a class="hero-card" href="workshops/ws2/index.html">
            <div class="hero-card-accent-bar"></div>
            <div class="hero-card-status">Verfügbar</div>
            <h2>Datenvisualisierung mit ggplot2</h2>
            <p class="hero-card-desc">
              Zweitägiger Workshop zur Grammar of Graphics: Schicht für Schicht
              zu professionellen Grafiken – von Streudiagrammen bis zu kombinierten
              Layouts mit patchwork.
            </p>
            <div class="hero-card-tags">
              <span class="hero-ctag">2 Tage</span>
              <span class="hero-ctag">Grundkenntnisse R</span>
              <span class="hero-ctag">ggplot2</span>
              <span class="hero-ctag">patchwork</span>
            </div>
            <div class="hero-card-footer">
              Zum Workshop
              <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M5 12h14M12 5l7 7-7 7"/></svg>
            </div>
          </a>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </header>

  <!-- HINWEISE -->
  <main class="main">
    <div class="sh">
      <span class="sh-label">Hinweise</span>
      <div class="sh-line"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="info-grid">
      <div class="info-card">
        <div class="info-label">Zielgruppe</div>
        <div class="info-val">Studierende und Forschende der empirischen Wissenschaften</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-card">
        <div class="info-label">Voraussetzungen</div>
        <div class="info-val">Siehe Workshopseiten</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-card">
        <div class="info-label">Software</div>
        <div class="info-val">R &amp; RStudio (kostenlos)</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-card">
        <div class="info-label">Zugang</div>
        <div class="info-val">Passwortgeschützt – auf Anfrage</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </main>

</div>
```
